title: TLSS Modpack
description: The Legendary Sigma SMP's official Fabric modpack for client-side and server-side, accross all seasons
body:
**This is [The Legendary Sigma SMP](https://modrinth.com/server/tlssmc)'s official Fabric modpack (client-side & server-side)**

ℹ️*All images* below *and in the* Gallery *were taken in* Minecraft **1.21.11** *or above with* [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined).
___
# 📥Installation:
This is The Legendary Sigma SMP's official Fabric modpack (client-side & server-side)
*made for* 1.21.11 *and* above, accross all seasons _(past, current and upcoming ones)_!

# ✨Features:
Check out [TLSS server](https://modrinth.com/server/tlssmc) for more information!

# 🛠️Versioning:
This modpack uses the following versioning system:
- **Client-side modpack:** [x.x.x]c + season number (1, 2, 3,...) 
  - -> *e.g.* **1.3.2c, 3.2.0c,...**
- **Server-side modpack:** [x.x.x]s + season number (1, 2, 3,...)
  - -> *e.g.* **1.3.2s, 3.2.0s,...**

# ⚠️Disclaimer!
The TLSS server is a *private hosted server* and **only whitelisted players** can join. Email gamersoftware.corp@gmail.com for application. Approvals often take ***24 to 48 hours or more***.

# 💘 Support me!
To help me and make me develop more fascinating projects, share and recommend this modpack. Thank you so much!!!

You can also try my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Titan1um) or the projects me and Polr made [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/titan1um-x-polr)! :D
